title: ZenRows Universal Scraper API Response
description: JSON envelope returned by the ZenRows Universal Scraper API when json_response, autoparse, css_extractor, or outputs is enabled.

url.description: Final URL of the page after redirects (mirrors the Zr-Final-Url response header).

html.description: Rendered HTML content of the page.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the target site.

headers.description: HTTP response headers returned by the target site.

cookies.description: Cookies set by the target site during the scrape.

xhr.description: Network requests captured during rendering when json_response is enabled.

emails.description: Email addresses discovered on the page (when emails is requested via outputs).

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers discovered on the page (when phone_numbers is requested via outputs).

links.description: Hyperlinks discovered on the page (when links is requested via outputs).

images.description: Image URLs discovered on the page (when images is requested via outputs).

autoparse.description: Structured fields produced by the autoparse extractor (shape varies by target site).

css_extractor.description: Field map populated from the user-provided css_extractor selectors.
